response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with C++ on Windows for capital markets or fixed-income systems. While their C++ experience is present, it is not recent or focused on financial systems, and their domain experience is more aligned with web/mobile applications rather than capital markets.
strengths: Strong software development background with 25+ years of experience in multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in building scalable systems and infrastructure (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq)
Experience with CI/CD, testing methodologies (TDD), and modern development practices
concerns: No clear recent C++ experience on Windows platform (last C++ role was 20+ years ago)
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems
Domain expertise is primarily in web/mobile applications and geospatial systems rather than financial systems
